goal: Wait for release.txt to appear, then write released.txt
instructions: In the task cwd, poll for a file named release.txt every 5 seconds, for up to 180 seconds. An external process creates release.txt partway through the window. As soon as release.txt exists, create released.txt whose entire content is exactly the ASCII bytes `released` (8 bytes, no trailing newline), declare released.txt as an artifact, and submit a succeeded result. Remain resident across ADP watcher slices for the whole polling window. If release.txt never appears within 180 seconds, submit a failed result and do not create released.txt.
completion_criteria: release.txt was observed to exist before released.txt was written
released.txt content is exactly `released` (8 bytes, no trailing newline)
released.txt is declared as a result artifact
